repo_notes.content: This repository is the aggregated documentation source for the MindStudio full-process toolchain. The root README.md is the project entry point. Each top-level tool directory contains its own README.md and may contain additional docs, guides, examples, and design materials. When generating the wiki, treat the repository as a documentation collection rather than a single codebase, and cover all listed tool directories instead of only sampling the first indexed subset.
The root README.md table is the canonical overview of all tools and should be used to build the wiki home page. Preserve the tool ordering used in README.md and in hooks/nav_tree.py where applicable.

pages.title: MindStudio Full-Process Toolchain Overview
pages.purpose: Provide the wiki home page. Summarize the repository purpose, explain that it aggregates MindStudio tool documentation, and list every top-level tool directory with a short function summary based on the root README.md and each tool README.md.

pages.title: Training Toolchain
pages.purpose: Summarize the training-related tools and documentation, especially mstt and related precision, profiling, monitoring, and memory tools. Use the README.md files and docs under mstt, msprobe, msprof, msprof-analyze, mspti, msmemscope, msmonitor, mssanitizer, and msserviceprofiler.

pages.title: Inference Toolchain
pages.purpose: Summarize the inference-related tools and documentation, especially msit and supporting tools. Use the README.md files and docs under msit, msmodelslim, mskl, mskpp, msdebug, msmodeling, and msinsight.

pages.title: Operator Development Toolchain
pages.purpose: Summarize the operator development and optimization tools. Use the README.md files and docs under msot, msopcom, msopgen, msopmodeling, msopprof, msoptuner, and mstx.

pages.title: msagent
pages.purpose: Document msagent based on msagent/README.md and any docs under msagent.

pages.purpose: Document msit based on msit/README.md and docs under msit, including model compression, debugging, and inference performance optimization.
